title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
